walk: The subject must be visibly walking — legs stepping forward in a natural alternating rhythm, arms swinging gently. Do not describe a static standing pose.
run: The subject must be visibly running — full stride, arms pumping, body leaning forward with momentum. Continuous motion throughout the clip.
dance: The subject must be actively dancing — body swaying, arms moving expressively, weight shifting with the rhythm. Do not describe a static posed stance.
fight: The subject must be in active combat motion — striking, blocking, dodging, or grappling with continuous momentum. Do not describe a static held pose.
fall: The subject must be visibly falling or tumbling — body rotating, limbs reacting to loss of balance, hair and clothing trailing the motion.
reach: The subject must be actively reaching or extending toward something — arm extending, body leaning, weight shifting. Continuous purposeful motion.
